title: Saccus nitidus
taxonomy: Saccus nitidus is classified as a species within the genus Saccus. The genus Saccus is a group of marine bivalve mollusks. These mollusks are part of the phylum Mollusca, which includes a wide variety of marine and freshwater animals. The specific classification of Saccus nitidus is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Mollusca, Class: Bivalvia, Order: Veneroida, Family: Spondylidae, Genus: Saccus, Species: S. nitidus. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification.
